title: Non-flying Weather
description: lightweight plugin to prevent players from using elytra when it's raining
body:
# Non-flying Weather
Lightweight plugin to disable elytra while rain

## Configuration
The config contains only 2 lines ```onrain-actionbar```, which is responsible for displaying a message in the action bar, and ```turtle-helmet-bypass```, for disable/enable bypass to players who wearing turtle helmet.
## Find bug or need help?
You can join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/m4sRHTZ8HS) and ask for help =)
